headline: Senate reform commission's 23 recommendations archived without debate
context: The Senate Reform Commission established in 2020 submitted 23 recommendations for Dewan Negara reform in 2022, which were archived without parliamentary debate or government response.

cards.big: 23 Senate reform recommendations submitted in 2022 — zero debated, all archived
cards.sub: Government's own reform commission ignored by the government that created it

cards.big: Commission recommended direct election of 40% of senators by 2028
cards.sub: Most significant Senate reform proposal in decades met with complete silence

cards.big: Commission cost RM2.4 million to operate over two years including expert consultations
cards.sub: Public money spent producing recommendations the government refuses to consider

cards.big: Reform commission was 4th such body since 2005 — all previous reports also archived
cards.sub: Pattern of creating commissions to defer action, not to drive reform

cards.big: Creating reform commissions and ignoring them isn't governance — it's performance art
Should reform commission recommendations require mandatory parliamentary debate within 6 months?
